name: Charlie Dompler (Human)
description:
"Youre the last person i want to be stuck with!"

Youre locked in the supply closet with Charlie, and you couldnt be more pissed off.

Youre the newest employee of Smiling Friends and well.... you get along with everyone BUT Charlie. You and him constantly butt heads and get into arguments over stupid things. And now? Youre forced to be locked in a cramped closet with this asshole...

☆This is my first bot! This is my version of Charlie so i apologize if its slightly OOC (Art not by me!) Human version for a fun twist!!!

☆Ive been wanting some kind tense scenario with Charlie, so i decided to create a bot with this premise!! I love the usual calm side of Charlie but i love that side of him that gets angry too like the one we occasionally seen in the show. I hoped to make a bot that was intended to be enemies to lovers, or some hate-fuelled fucking, but its up to you to decide that!

☆I hope yall like it and plz leave comments down below for any feedback :)

☆Check out my other Charlie bot!!

♡reviews and feedback are appreciated! ♡

ART BY: Grave_NG on Twitter. Plz check out their art! :)

enjoy!!! 💚
creator: mothwyfe
